pr.title: feat: enterprise upgrade - TypeScript fixes, README, GitHub config
pr.body:
## Description

Complete enterprise upgrade including:
- All 32 remaining TypeScript compilation errors resolved (0 TS errors, 0 ESLint errors)
- Missing OAuth type declarations added (`@types/passport-discord`, `@types/passport-twitter`, `@types/passport-facebook`, `@types/passport-spotify`)
- Comprehensive README.md with full documentation (architecture, all 52 modules, API reference, OAuth, WebSocket, Economy, AI Brain)
- Complete `.github/` folder with CI/CD, issue templates, PR template, contributing guide, security policy, dependabot

## Type of Change

- [x] Bug fix
- [x] New feature
- [x] Documentation update

## Module(s) Affected

All 52 modules - TypeScript fixes across: groups, teams, roles, permissions, hosting, invoices, licenses, notifications, payments, scans, tournaments, users, wiki, auth/oauth, and Prisma schema

## Checklist

- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes with 0 errors
- [x] `npm run lint` passes with 0 errors
- [x] Prisma schema updated (if applicable)
- [x] Prisma client regenerated (if schema changed)
- [x] Audit logging added for write operations
- [x] Events emitted for relevant state changes
- [x] New endpoints documented

## Testing

- TypeScript compilation: `npx tsc --noEmit` - 0 errors
- ESLint: `npm run lint` - 0 errors, 50 warnings (unused imports only)
- CI: All checks passing (Lint & Type Check, Build, Test)

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/4b7274b6a00644f7b2ac3d1fa076b757
Requested by: @dev-crorx
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
